name: clean-refactor
description: A well-structured refactor that follows all house patterns — should pass with no findings.

pr.title: Refactor user service to use shared DB client
pr.author: priya
pr.description: Replaces the inline pg.Pool instantiation in the user service with the shared getDbClient() helper, aligning it with our standard DB access pattern.

agentResponse.summary: All changed files follow house patterns: named exports used throughout, shared DB client accessed via getDbClient(), and file placed correctly in the services layer.
